_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
*No direct ACT registration or ongoing reporting obligation applies to the workspace as a freight forwarder. The ACT one-time fleet/large-entity reporting obligation is addressed under the Threshold Questions section and requires cross-reference to ACF.*

The workspace should register for CARB ACT email updates to receive notices of public hearings, rulemaking amendments, and compliance guidance. Contact: actreporting@arb.ca.gov / (866) 634-3735.

*Source: CARB Advanced Clean Trucks program page. https://ww2.arb.ca.gov/our-work/programs/advanced-clean-trucks*

---
